twists: On the road, a bridge keeper demanded a song before passage.
A local child offered a suspiciously accurate map for a copper token.
Fog rolled in, forcing a detour through abandoned orchards.
A rumor spread that the guild's seal was cursed.
success_lines: The town praised the guild and asked for your banner to fly at the gate.
The mission concluded cleanly, and the locals shared hidden supplies.
Everything clicked into place; your minion returned with clear wins.
partial_lines: The objective was met, but only after costly compromises.
Progress came slowly; the town helped, but only after long persuasion.
The mission worked out in the end, though not without bruised pride.
failure_lines: A misunderstanding with local guards forced an early retreat.
Plans unraveled under pressure, and little was salvaged.
Bad weather and bad luck turned the task into a cautionary tale.
